target: 7. Power Outage
Can't be… I can't see anything in the dark.
S-shin-chan, are you nearby?

Stay calm.
I'm here.
Why did the lights go out all of a sudden?
I don't know…

(Who turned off the lights?
Or was it… a power outage?)
(For now, I need to stay close to Mio.)
Hold Mio's hand
Speak to Mio to calm her down

Mio, hold my hand.
If we get separated in this situation,
it'll be a problem.

Oh, right!
Then… here.
Don't let go no matter what.

Yeah.
I won't let go for sure.
Mio, are you okay?

I'm okay… but
I hate the dark…
For now, stay still until our eyes adjust.
Eventually, we'll be able to see a little.

Heh… you're so calm, Shin-chan.
You're really reliable.
(My eyes are finally getting used to the dark…)
(But what caused that power outage?)
(If even the emergency lights went out, it must be serious.)

Hey!
Is anyone there?
Wha—!?
That voice… Butchi?

Ah, maybe…
But don't shout.
There's a chance it's a Shadow.

(Butchi—her nickname <color=#GF_TIPS_032>Butchi</color>.
She's our teacher, and the teacher for all the kids on the island.)
(It's been years since I last heard her voice.)

It's forbidden to be out at night!
If someone's there, come out!
What do we do, Shin-chan?

(This place is away from the shrine and the harbor.
It's possible Butchi isn't a Shadow yet…
But…)
It's better to be cautious.

Since I can't be sure Butchi isn't a Shadow,
I want to avoid contact.
Let's hide somewhere and wait it out.

(Inside the locker behind the classroom.
That should be…)
Mio, hide in the classroom locker.

Eh!?
A locker…?
Hurry!

H-hold on, Shin-chan?
This place… it's so cramped!

Don't move much.
Just hold on for a little while.
Yeah…

Oh, the door's open.
Quickly close it…

No, leave it open.
If we close it, she'll notice.
Stay quiet and hold your breath.

I know someone's there.
Come out quickly.
(She's getting really close…)
This must be it.
(I just hope she doesn't notice us…)
Huh?

Something's strange.
Why is the locker slightly open?
I found you…
Ugh…!
Hiss!?
Ah, it's Shinpei-kun.
Also with Mio-chan?

I told you to come out, teacher.
It's not good.
Hiding here like this.
Ugh…!
Hey!
Now! Get out!
Shin-chan!
Just run away quickly!
Y-yeah!
Ow…!

It's been a while, but you're always causing trouble.
When did you become such a rowdy kid, Shinpei-kun?

(If I can't be sure if this Butchi is a fake,
I don't want to attack the real one…)
Come here, I won't get angry.
(For now, I need to stall her!)
Ahhhh!
Aaaaaa!
Huh!?

(I just knocked the locker to the floor,
but why is she in so much pain?)
(Never mind that! I need to get out of here fast!)

Shin-chan!
I'm glad you're safe.
That Butchi… was a Shadow?

I don't know.
But if that Butchi was a Shadow, the real one is already…

It's about time.
Let's head to the harbor.

Ah, wait.
I heard someone running?

…It's moving away.
They probably didn't notice us.
(It could be a Shadow or another survivor…)
Maybe it's Tokiko and Sou?

It's possible…
But checking it out is dangerous.

For now, we should prioritize heading to the harbor.
I've already sent a message,
so if we're safe, we can meet there.
We won't meet anyone.

That's right…
The ferry is about to arrive.
…That Butchi was scary.

But if it's Butchi,
getting angry at students sneaking into school at night
isn't that strange.

Next time we meet, I'll have to apologize.
I'm sorry for sneaking into the school.

Yeah.
I think she'll forgive you if you apologize properly.
That's how Butchi was.

Ah…
She was really scary when angry,
but she was actually so kind.
She'll definitely forgive me…

Someone's here!
Mio, watch out――

Hey!
Both of you!
Alan!?
Dad…

I found you here.
When I came back from the restroom,
everyone was gone,
and I was shocked.

The ferry's about to leave,
so let's go to the harbor together.
Why are you so quiet, Shinpei?

I was worried since you didn't come back
even after waiting a while.
Come on, hurry――
Just stop it.

Don't confuse me further with the voice and appearance
of someone I care about.

Shadows don't just copy humans and look exactly like them…
They kill the original and take their place.
Shinpei… what are you talking about?

There were signs that a Shadow had erased the original person
in the house.

That black, human-shaped stain…
Could it be the mark left
when you killed the real Alan?

I know your true identity!
Don't pretend to be Alan!

I see.
That stain was like that, huh?

Stop!
Don't come any closer!

Okay, okay.
I won't get close, but let's talk.
Mio, hide behind me.
Hmm…
You're going to listen to the story, huh?
Ah.
Well, let's start from the beginning and go step by step.

That was…
Just before you all arrived.

When I was cleaning in front of the store,
I heard some sounds of a fight coming from inside the house.

I cautiously went inside the house,
Then a bright light appeared.
When I rushed into the room…

I saw the feeling of someone jumping out through the open window,
And that strange black stain on the floor.
…So what?
Well, think about it like this:

A burglar sneaked in,
Then was attacked by the shadow chasing them,
And was erased.

What Shinpei found was
The traces of the burglar being erased.
You expect me to believe that!

Assuming that story was true,
Where did that shadow go?!
Why wasn't Alan harmed?!
Besides, there was never any burglar!

Ah, right… 
But back then I didn't know about the shadow,
And I didn't understand what the black stain meant.

Plus, if I had said something like that,
I wouldn't have worried you.

But now that Shinpei explained it,
I finally understood the truth.

I understand if you're suspicious.
That's why I'll say it again.
Shinpei, I am the real Alan.
Shin-chan…
(Considering the situation, this is definitely the Shadow Alan)

(But if by some chance,
I'm wrong about this…)

Announcing.
The last ferry to the mainland will soon arrive at the port.
There's a possibility you'll have to wait until tomorrow morning for the next ferry.

If you wish to travel to the mainland today,
please come to the port.

Shinpei.
Even if you don't believe me,
it's fine.

But I don't want to lose any more family members.
Come on, let's go to the port quickly!

Hey, Shin-chan.
I want to believe Dad.
Mio…
After all, he didn't even try to attack us.

That must mean
He's really our dad, right?
Mio… I'll protect you…
(Ushio… What should I do…?)

If it's too hard to come with me,
we can meet at the port.

Hey, Shin-chan.
Go with Dad?
I want to go together as a group of three.
Thank you, Mio.
